ground_truth.title: San Diego, CA Live Weather Cameras & Webcams | WeatherBug
ground_truth.main_content: San Diego, CA Weather Cameras. Live weather camera views from multiple locations including: LSN06 - California State University Fullerton in Fullerton, California; San Bernardino CA at Ontario, California; Marshall ES in San Bernardino, California; College of the Canyons in Santa Clarita, California; Oxnard High School in Oxnard, California; Pahrump Valley HS in Pahrump, Nevada; Sierra Vista HS in Las Vegas, Nevada; Bob Miller MS in Henderson, Nevada; Las Vegas Ballpark in Summerlin South, Nevada; Las Vegas Day School in Spring Valley, Nevada; Southeast Career Technical Academy in Paradise, Nevada; Boulder City - view from River Mtn. in Boulder City, Nevada; Cadence Development; Mike O Callaghan MS i3 Learn Academy; Skye Canyon; City of Glendale Media Center; Pleasant Harbor; Prescott Courthouse Square; Copper Sky Regional Park; Palomar Hotel; South Mountain High School; Arizona Science Center; Phoenix Children's Hospital; W. Mack Lyon MS; Coyote Springs Golf Club; Fairmont Scottsdale Princess; Talking Stick Resort; Chandler Courthouse Plaza; Town of Gilbert; Four Seasons Scottsdale. Browse weather cameras by category including Beach Cams, City Skylines, Mountain Cams, Stadium Cams, and Cool Spots.
